text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Event (PDE)/Drug Characteristics Codebook │ July 2025 │ V 1.8 
50 
QTY_DSPNSD_NUM 
LABEL: 
Quantity Dispensed 
DESCRIPTION: This field indicates the number of units, grams, milliliters, or other quantity dispensed in the current 
drug event. 
If the PDE was for a compounded item, the quantity dispensed is the total of all ingredients. If the PDE 
was for a partial fill, the quantity dispensed is the total amount
